evidence_quotes.quote: predatory micro-transactions that have found their way into video games.
They use gambling like mechanics to hook players into paying for digital items like skins for weapons or characters

paragraphs.text: I wish this could also cover digital video games. Most games are now sold digitally but they could just be removed from your library as soon as the developer or publisher thinks, it is no longer worth keeping up the support for it. They often design their software to not be functional after that point, so the purchased media is lost forever. On top of that, I wish that this would also cover all the predatory micro-transactions that have found their way into video games. They use gambling like mechanics to hook players into paying for digital items like skins for weapons or characters and often the audience includes kids, who's brains are just not developed enough to fall into this trap.
